title: SG Mob Spawn
description: A mod that adds mob spawns for higher difficulty like illusioners, zombie horses, cave spiders, etc.
body:
![Breezes with blazes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6374eafd9508a6842e005f8c55e14e054282eae0_0.webp)![Cave spiders in caves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cef0f9b1abb54fe33529365f3ccecdbc9834e80d_0.webp)![Illusioners with evokers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05c1dce6f65960eb564fd8bc835d32c5c09bd112_0.webp)![Zombie horses during storms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b584eee4b2c90c9090d346bc6cfc0e119f373901_0.webp)A mod that adds mob spawns for higher difficulty like illusioners, zombie horses, cave spiders, etc.
When spawn in high difficulty:
- Blazes have a 70% chance to spawn a Breeze if the biome is warped forest
- Spiders bellow Y 0 have a 85% to spawn a Cave spider
- Bats bellow Y 0 have a 50% chance to spawn a Silverfish
- Evokers have a 80% chance to spawn a Illusioner
- Zombies have a 5% chance to spawn riding a Zombie horse (when thundering)
